name: KlimaDAO
jurisdiction: DAO (no central jurisdiction; treasury operations in Cayman Islands foundation)

custodian.name: Treasury managed by KLIMA governance multisig

oracle.name: On-chain pricing from SushiSwap KLIMA/BCT pool

regulator.name: None — voluntary carbon market, DAO structure

summary: DeFi protocol designed to drive demand for tokenized carbon credits via algorithmic treasury accumulation. KLIMA token backed by basket of carbon credits (BCT, NCT, MCO2). At late-2021 peak held ~17M tonnes of carbon credits, claiming to have driven significant demand for voluntary carbon market. Significant controversy: critics argued KlimaDAO's bonding mechanism drove demand for low-quality, pre-2008 vintage credits, inflating prices without supporting genuine climate impact. Token collapsed >99% from peak following Verra's May 2022 prohibition on re-tokenization of retired credits, which disrupted KlimaDAO's supply pipeline.

sources.title: CarbonPlan: Critique of KlimaDAO carbon credit quality (2022)
Verra statement prohibiting retired credit tokenization (May 2022)

underlying_asset: Basket of tokenized carbon credits accumulated via bonding: BCT (Base Carbon Tonne), NCT (Nature Carbon Tonne), MCO2 (Moss).
reserve_composition: Treasury holds carbon credit tokens; KLIMA supply backed by treasury at minimum redemption price (3 BCT per KLIMA at design).
secondary_market: SushiSwap KLIMA/USDC, KLIMA/BCT pools on Polygon.
oracle_provider: SushiSwap DEX TWAP for carbon credit pricing.
redemption_mechanism: KLIMA holders can stake for yield or redeem against treasury at minimum redemption price (in BCT equivalent).
upgrade_authority: KlimaDAO governance via Snapshot voting; KLIMA token holders.

timeline.event: TVL peaks ~$800M; ~17M tonnes carbon credits held
Verra prohibits retired credit tokenization; supply pipeline disrupted
CarbonPlan and academic critiques on credit quality publish
Pivot toward direct carbon project financing via Carbonmark partnership
